summary: Iteration 22: Grant Agreement PDF Generation Testing. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: PDF download working correctly from Contracts page. The DOCX template is properly filled and converted to PDF using LibreOffice.

minor.issue: BAC signatory name replacement fails for text split across runs - 'Islam Abd El-Aal' is split as ['I', 'slam Abd El-Aal'] in DOCX runs, preventing proper replacement with custom issuer_name. Uses default 'Islam Abd El-Aal' instead of configured issuer.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <select> - minor console warning from Emergent framework, doesn't affect functionality

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix BAC signatory name replacement in grant_agreement_generator.py - text 'Islam Abd El-Aal' is split across DOCX runs and needs special handling
critical_code_review_comments: Grant Agreement PDF generation works correctly - uses user's DOCX template
Standards checkboxes are properly marked: ☑ for selected, ☐ for unselected
Organization name, address, scope, and sites are correctly filled
LibreOffice conversion to PDF works (66-579 KB output depending on content)
GET /api/certification-agreements endpoint properly returns list of signed agreements

success_rate.frontend: 100% - PDF downloads working from Contracts page

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - tested with existing 7 certification agreements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grant Agreement PDF generation fully functional. Uses DOCX template at /app/backend/assets/grant_agreement_template.docx. Standards checkboxes work correctly (ISO9001, ISO14001 tested). PDF downloads from Contracts page (/admin?tab=contracts) work via /api/public/contracts/{access_token}/pdf/bilingual endpoint. Minor issue: BAC signatory name replacement in template signature section doesn't work due to text split across runs.

grant_agreement_pdf.template_filling: WORKING - organization name, address, standards, scope, sites

frontend_download.button: Download (تحميل) button next to each contract

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - No actual emails sent (SMTP not configured)
